title: Gant, Baseline, Hours
excerpt:

posts.author: fwoodley (Faye M Woodley)
posts.cookedHtml:
I love the baseline view but have a few questions involving Export to Excel from the Gant view of a dashboard involving multiple boards:

  1. How do I export so that the Board Name shows up WITH the entire timeline, as seen in the GANT view in Monday?
  2. Can the hours show by week? Or MUST i use the resource management tool and merge the two?
  3. Will the Actual vs Baseline show up in Excel export? My boss wants to see everything in EXCEL not Monday so this requires much manual labor each week.
